facts.setting: Laura filmed the doll without asking permission.
criticalEvents: Laura filmed the doll without asking permission.
That night, it appeared in the background of a photograph taken inside her locked apartment.
Laura Chen was a travel videographer researching allegedly haunted objects when the story began in a museum archive in Key West and a nearby rental apartment.
The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.
facts.threat: Laura filmed the doll without asking permission.
facts.primaryReveal: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.finalConsequence: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.unresolvedQuestion: Did Laura Chen defeat the thing at the centre of the story, or did the encounter simply teach it how to remain hidden?
